Video.summary: Lou and Sonia are on a hunt for a 2007 Porsche & a 2008 Audi from the same drug dealing debtor.
Video.title: Intoxicated Marina Idiots

Video.summary: Lou devises a plan to have Froy and Sonia pose as house buyers.
Video.title: Playing the Role

Video.summary: Froy, Lou, and Matt wrestle a group of body builders when going after a Jeep Commander.
Video.title: Broken Bones and Broken Phones

Video.summary: Matt and Lou find themselves in an upscale neighborhood, facing off with a distraught accountant.
Video.title: The Hearse Isn't Empty?

Video.summary: Sonia and Lou see the signs of the bad economy first-hand.
Video.title: Froy Gets Beat Up

Video.summary: Froy and Lyndah get a tip from a spotter that leads them to an angry bride in the passenger side.
Video.title: This Is No Fantasy

Video.summary: Lou, Sonia, and Froy track down an RV that has been missing for 30 years.
Video.title: The Missing RV and the Private Jet

Image.alt: The Missing RV and the Private Jet
The Missing RV and the Private Jet
The Missing RV and the Private Jet

Video.summary: Lou, Sonia, and Matt wrangle with two belligerent truckers.
Video.title: Pyramid Scams and Princesses

Video.summary: the team heads to the beach to grab a little sun as well as two luxury jet skis.
Video.title: Jet Skis and Massages

Video.summary: Lou, Sonia, and Froy unfurl an elaborate sting when they repo a taxicab.
Video.title: Get That Prowler

Video.summary: it's up, up, and away, for Lou, Froy, and Matt.
Video.title: Up Up and Away

Video.summary: Lou, Froy, and Matt team up with Eva, an alluring lending agent.
Video.title: Family Drama

Video.summary: Lyndah has some tension with Frankie when they repo a truck from a moving company.
Video.title: Kegger and Refrigerator

Video.summary: Sonia and Froy arrive on the scene to a repo a car that's been refitted to run on biodiesel.
Video.title: Going Green and Falling Down

Video.summary: Sonia and Froy get locked in the battle of a lifetime with a pair of young debtors.
Video.title: Look What You Did!

Video.summary: Sonia and Lyndah are faced with a choice.
Video.title: That's Disrespectful

Video.summary: Matt and Froy venture into one of the city's most dangerous neighborhoods.
Video.title: Smoke, Lead, and Alcohol

Video.summary: Lyndah is put in a tough situation.
Video.title: Missed Dates

Video.summary: Froy and Lyndah probably need to schedule a trip to the dentist after Lou's tooth gets knocked out.
Video.title: Broken Tooth Lou and Bad Breath Frankie

Image.alt: Broken Tooth Lou and Bad Breath Frankie
Broken Tooth Lou and Bad Breath Frankie
Broken Tooth Lou and Bad Breath Frankie

Video.summary: Matt and Froy cope with the uncertainty of Lou's condition by liberating a Vespa.
Video.title: Matt Vs. Giant Chicken

Video.summary: Matt and Sonia hit the beach to repossess an old-fashioned classic surfer car.
Video.title: Segway This Way

Video.summary: Sonia and Froy get messy when they head to Venice Beach to track down and recover a canoe.
Video.title: The Canals of Deceit

Video.summary: Lyndah and Matt interrupt a debtor's bicycle ride to repossess his Jeep.
Video.title: Captain Lou

Video.summary: Sonia, Matt, Froy, and Lou roll up and roll on a gang of brothers to gain possession of an Infinity.
Video.title: Who Wants Ice Cream?

Video.summary: Lou sends Sonia and Froy out to repo from a pizza delivery man way behind on his payments.
Video.title: The Cop, the Pizza Delivery Man, and the Repo Men

Image.alt: The Cop, the Pizza Delivery Man, and the Repo Men
The Cop, the Pizza Delivery Man, and the Repo Men
The Cop, the Pizza Delivery Man, and the Repo Men

Video.summary: things get hairy when Sonia and Lyndah repo from outside a wig shop.
Video.title: Hairy Situations

Video.summary: Sonia and Lou deal with a terrible boss and his instigating employees.
Video.title: Business Issues

Video.summary: a wrench is thrown in the works, and at the car, when Froy and Matt try to repo from a plumber.
Video.title: Wrench in the Works

Video.summary: Matt and Froy get some help from a friendly gardener that lead them to discover a car hidden in the backyard.
Video.title: Hidden Cars and Higher Powers

Video.summary: Lou, Sonia, and Froy have to push away a debtor while trying to push a classic car up a hill.
Video.title: Rolling Away

Video.summary: Froy and Mike, the new guy, repo a car at a paintball range.
Video.title: Matt's Back

Video.summary: Lou and Sonia repo a compact sedan from a trio of gun-wielding, bottle-breaking gangsta gals.
Video.title: Burgers, Bottles, and Hustlers

Video.summary: Matt and Froy have to choose between the job and their lives when they're confronted by gun-toting players.
Video.title: Strapped on the Court

Video.summary: Lou, Matt, and Froy get interrupted on a routine job by a registered owner with an unregistered blade.
Video.title: Role-players and Blade Swayers

Video.summary: Sonia and Froy's relationship takes a strange turn on a repo that puts them face-to-face with two strangers.
Video.title: Caught with Their Pants Down

Video.summary: Sonia and Lyndah find themselves at a local University trying to reclaim from a not-so-honorable student.
Video.title: Honor Rolling Away

Video.summary: Matt and Froy need to call in the cops to help out with an inebriated old-timer armed with a tazer.
Video.title: Tazed and Amazed

Video.summary: Lou, Lyndah, and Matt head to a cul-de-sac to gain possession of a speedboat, and a truck, and a trailer.
Video.title: Collectibles

Video.summary: Lou, Froy, and Matt press charges after a violent debtor attacks the crew.
Video.title: Adult Film Star

Video.summary: Matt and Froy interrupt a young couple's romantic entanglement.
Video.title: Pizza, Hook-ups, and a Suspicious Suitcase

Image.alt: Pizza, Hook-ups, and a Suspicious Suitcase
Pizza, Hook-ups, and a Suspicious Suitcase
Pizza, Hook-ups, and a Suspicious Suitcase

Video.summary: Lou calls in an exterminator and has Froy, Sonia, and Lyndah go to an address to ambush them for their truck.
Video.title: Exterminate or Retaliate

Video.summary: Lou sends Sonia and Matt to repo a Toyota Corolla from a recently divorced debtor.
Video.title: Unwanted Seizures

Video.summary: Froy and Sonia douse a couple with a dose of pepper spray when the debtor gets too pushy with Sonia.
Video.title: Pepper Spray and Guns
